enhancement:alpha-leader.effect: Kroot Character only. Each time a friendly Kroot unit within 6" of this model makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
enhancement:alpha-leader.name: Alpha Leader

enhancement:arch-negator.effect: вражеские юниты теряют способность Objective Secured, находясь на objective marker в радиусе 3" от носителя.
enhancement:arch-negator.name: Arch-negator

enhancement:ard-as-nails.effect: 4+ Feel No Pain, но только один раз за бой
enhancement:ard-as-nails.name: 'Ard as Nails

enhancement:artisan.effect: один дружественный CORPUSCARY юнит получает +1 AP ко всем атакам на время боя.
enhancement:artisan.name: Artisan

enhancement:autoclavic-denunciation.effect: когда носитель погибает, радиус эффекта Rad-bombardment расширяется на 6" до конца игры (действует на все objective markers в радиусе).
enhancement:autoclavic-denunciation.name: Autoclavic Denunciation

enhancement:battle-sphere-uplink.effect: пока носитель находится на поле боя, дружественные юниты SKITARII в радиусе 36" получают +1 к своей характеристике Ballistic Skill.
enhancement:battle-sphere-uplink.name: Battle-sphere Uplink

enhancement:belicosa-class-capacitor-van.effect: пока носитель и его юнит находятся под эффектом Canticle, их ranged-оружие также получает [ASSAULT] и [IGNORES COVER].
enhancement:belicosa-class-capacitor-van.name: Belicosa-class Capacitor Vanes

enhancement:bionik-workshop.effect:
At the start of the battle, roll one D3. Until end of battle, models in bearer's unit have:
  - 1. Bionik Legs: +2" Move
  - 2. Bionik Arms: +1 S on melee weapons
  - 3. Bionik Bonce: Improve WS by 1
enhancement:bionik-workshop.name: Bionik Workshop

enhancement:blackout-key.effect: в вашей Command Phase выберите одну вражескую модель в 12" от носителя. Она теряет все auras и abilities до начала вашей следующей Command Phase.
enhancement:blackout-key.name: Blackout-key

enhancement:blitzkaptin.effect: After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer's unit (or any Transport it is embarked within) is on the battlefield, select up to three Orks Vehicle units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
enhancement:blitzkaptin.name: Blitzkaptin

enhancement:cantic-thrallnet.effect: вражеские юниты не могут быть выставлены с Deep Strike или Strategic Reserves в радиусе 12" от носителя.
enhancement:cantic-thrallnet.name: Cantic Thrallnet

enhancement:clandestine-infiltrator.effect: носитель может быть выставлен в резерв за пределами зоны высадки противника (Infiltrators).
enhancement:clandestine-infiltrator.name: Clandestine Infiltrator

enhancement:cognitive-reinforcement.effect: один дружественный юнит может перебрасывать один кубик To Hit за фазу.
enhancement:cognitive-reinforcement.name: Cognitive Reinforcement

enhancement:cybernetic-controller.effect: один дружественный KASTELAN ROBOT юнит получает +1 к характеристикам Weapon Skill и Ballistic Skill.
enhancement:cybernetic-controller.name: Cybernetic Controller

enhancement:da-gobshot-thunderbuss.effect: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [HAZARDOUS] abilities.
enhancement:da-gobshot-thunderbuss.name: Da Gobshot Thunderbuss

enhancement:da-kaptin.effect: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Orks unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of the bearer. That unit suffers D3 mortal wounds and it is no longer Battle-shocked.
enhancement:da-kaptin.name: Da Kaptin

enhancement:data-blessed-autosermon.effect: в начале вашей Command Phase вы можете выбрать два разных Canticle вместо одного. Они действуют одновременно.
enhancement:data-blessed-autosermon.name: Data-blessed Autosermon

enhancement:dead-shiny-shootas.effect: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability.
enhancement:dead-shiny-shootas.name: Dead Shiny Shootas

enhancement:emotionless-clarity.effect: один дружественный CORPUSCARY юнит игнорирует все модификаторы характеристик Ballistic Skill и Weapon Skill.
enhancement:emotionless-clarity.name: Emotionless Clarity

enhancement:follow-me-ladz.effect: когда этот персонаж совершает Heroic Intervention, дружественные ORKS в 6' могут сделать то же самое
enhancement:follow-me-ladz.name: Follow Me Ladz

enhancement:genetor-upgrade.effect: один дружественный EXPLORATOR INFANTRY юнит получает +1 к Toughness.
enhancement:genetor-upgrade.name: Genetor Upgrade

enhancement:git-spotter-squig.effect: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.
enhancement:git-spotter-squig.name: Git-Spotter Squig

enhancement:gob-boomer.effect: Each time the bearer issues Taktiks, it can do so to a friendly Orks Infantry or Orks Mounted unit within 18", instead of 6".
enhancement:gob-boomer.name: Gob Boomer

enhancement:headwoppas-killchoppa.effect: оружие ближнего боя: S+2, AP-2, D3, каждый раз при убийстве модели, этот персонаж может совершить ещё одну атаку
enhancement:headwoppas-killchoppa.name: Headwoppa's Killchoppa

enhancement:irradiated-payload.effect: ranged-оружие носителя получает правило [HAZARDOUS] и +1 к Strength.
enhancement:irradiated-payload.name: Irradiated Payload

enhancement:kunnin-an-brutal.effect: Beast Snagga character in the unit
enhancement:kunnin-an-brutal.name: Kunnin' an' Brutal

enhancement:kustom-job.effect: в фазе командования WALKER восстанавливает D3 wounds
enhancement:kustom-job.name: Kustom Job

enhancement:logis-master.effect: один раз за бой, после любого броска кубиков дружественным юнитом вы можете перебросить этот бросок.
enhancement:logis-master.name: Logis-Master

enhancement:machine-spirit-node.effect: дружественные KASTELAN ROBOTS юниты получают Feel No Pain 5+.
enhancement:machine-spirit-node.name: Machine-Spirit Node

enhancement:master-of-the-hunt.effect: +1 to Hit для Kroot при движении
enhancement:master-of-the-hunt.name: Master of the Hunt

enhancement:mechanicus-arcanus.effect: вражеские PSYKER-юниты в пределах rad-zone (от Rad-bombardment или Rad-Ordinance) теряют все свои Psychic-способности.
enhancement:mechanicus-arcanus.name: Mechanicus Arcanus

enhancement:mek-kaptin.effect: During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Flash Gitz unit. Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
enhancement:mek-kaptin.name: Mek Kaptin

enhancement:mightiest-of-bosses.effect: пока этот персонаж жив, дружественные ORKS в 6' перебрасывают 1 to Wound
enhancement:mightiest-of-bosses.name: Mightiest of Bosses

enhancement:morks-kunnin.effect: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Orks units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
enhancement:morks-kunnin.name: Mork's Kunnin'

enhancement:necromechanic.effect: один раз за бой, в вашей Command Phase, носитель может восстановить D3 потерянных ран одному дружественному VEHICLE юниту в 3".
enhancement:necromechanic.name: Necromechanic

enhancement:neurotransience-auspice.effect: носитель получает способность Feel No Pain 5+ против Psychic-атак.
enhancement:neurotransience-auspice.name: Neurotransience Auspice

enhancement:neuroweb-commander.effect: враги не могут стрелять по другим целям пока этот командир жив
enhancement:neuroweb-commander.name: Neuroweb Commander

enhancement:neuroweb-system-jammer.effect: враги в 12' не могут использовать перебросы попадания
enhancement:neuroweb-system-jammer.name: Neuroweb System Jammer

enhancement:nomadic-hunter.effect: Kroot Character only. At the start of the battle round, select one objective marker on the battlefield that is not within your deployment zone. While a friendly Kroot unit from your army is within range of that objective marker, that unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its Objective Control characteristic.
enhancement:nomadic-hunter.name: Nomadic Hunter

enhancement:override-command.effect: один раз за бой, в начале любой фазы вы можете сменить текущий Protocol на другой без ожидания следующей фазы.
enhancement:override-command.name: Override Command

enhancement:paragon-of-the-imperative.effect: один раз за бой в любой фазе носитель может активировать: +1 к Hit, +1 к Wound и +1 к Save до конца фазы.
enhancement:paragon-of-the-imperative.name: Paragon of the Imperative

enhancement:patients-folly.effect: носитель и его юнит получают +1" к Move и +1" к Charge.
enhancement:patients-folly.name: Patient's Folly

enhancement:precision-of-the-hunter.effect: +1 to wound при стрельбе по ближайшей цели
enhancement:precision-of-the-hunter.name: Precision of the Hunter

enhancement:precision-of-the-patient-hun.effect: +1 to Hit в первый раз при стрельбе
enhancement:precision-of-the-patient-hun.name: Precision of the Patient Hunter

enhancement:predators-instincts.effect: Kroot Character only. While this model is leading a unit, that unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its Advance and Charge rolls.
enhancement:predators-instincts.name: Predator's Instincts

enhancement:puretide-engram-neurochip.effect: после убийства отряда, получи CP на 2+
enhancement:puretide-engram-neurochip.name: Puretide Engram Neurochip

enhancement:rad-ordinance.effect: вокруг носителя создаётся постоянная радиационная зона радиусом 3". Вражеские юниты в этой зоне теряют -1 T.
enhancement:rad-ordinance.name: Rad-Ordinance

enhancement:razgits-magik-map.effect: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Orks Infantry units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
enhancement:razgits-magik-map.name: Razgit's Magik Map

enhancement:runnin-boots.effect: Each time you make a Charge roll for the bearer's unit, if that unit disembarked from a Transport this turn, add 1 to the result.
enhancement:runnin-boots.name: Runnin' Boots

enhancement:skwad-leader.effect: During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Kommandos unit. While leading a Kommandos unit, it has the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities.
enhancement:skwad-leader.name: Skwad Leader

enhancement:solid-image-projection-unit.effect: 2+ invuln против стрельбы, один раз за бой
enhancement:solid-image-projection-unit.name: Solid-image Projection Unit

enhancement:sparkly-jubbly.effect: при перегрузке на результате 6 эффект удваивается
enhancement:sparkly-jubbly.name: Sparkly Jubbly

enhancement:stealthy-stalker.effect: Kroot Character only. The unit this model is leading is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
enhancement:stealthy-stalker.name: Stealthy Stalker

enhancement:supercharged-squig-oil.effect: Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls for the selected Vehicle model's unit.
enhancement:supercharged-squig-oil.name: Supercharged Squig Oil

enhancement:targetin-squigs.effect: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
enhancement:targetin-squigs.name: Targetin' Squigs

enhancement:templar-fervour.effect: один дружественный DATA-PSALM CONCLAVE юнит, находящийся под эффектом Canticle, может совершить атаку (стрельбу или ближний бой) сразу после того, как он уничтожен, до своего удаления.
enhancement:templar-fervour.name: Templar Fervour

enhancement:the-big-tusk.effect: +1 S, AP на оружии ближнего боя
enhancement:the-big-tusk.name: The Big Tusk

enhancement:transdimensional-annihilator.effect: оружие носителя получает [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] и +2 к Strength.
enhancement:transdimensional-annihilator.name: Transdimensional Annihilator

enhancement:tuff-git.effect: At the end of a phase in which the bearer's unit disembarked from a Transport, if that unit is Battle-shocked, it is no longer Battle-shocked.
enhancement:tuff-git.name: Tuff Git

enhancement:unmatched-tenacity.effect: носитель и его юнит получают Feel No Pain 5+ против Mortal Wounds.
enhancement:unmatched-tenacity.name: Unmatched Tenacity

enhancement:zealous-devotion.effect: носитель может быть выбран для выполнения Heroic Intervention. Все дружественные ERADICATION юниты в 6" от него после Heroic Intervention перебрасывают Charge в этой фазе.
enhancement:zealous-devotion.name: Zealous Devotion

enhancement:zog-off-and-eat-dakka.effect: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
enhancement:zog-off-and-eat-dakka.name: Zog Off and Eat Dakka!
